2026-07-15T19:51:04.8364022Z [36;1m[0m

2026-07-15T19:51:04.8364958Z [36;1m  Set-Location $wd[0m

2026-07-15T19:51:04.8367429Z [36;1m} -ArgumentList $wd[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:04.8367719Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:04.8368034Z [36;1mWait-Job -Job $srcJob, $skiaJob | Out-Null[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:04.8368490Z [36;1mif ($srcJob.State -ne 'Completed') { Receive-Job $srcJob; throw "Source download failed" }[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:04.8369361Z [36;1mif ($skiaJob.State -ne 'Completed') { Receive-Job $skiaJob; throw "Skia download failed" }[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:04.8370142Z [36;1mRemove-Job -Job $srcJob, $skiaJob[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:04.8370392Z [36;1m[0m

2026-07-15T19:51:34.5040005Z ##[group]Run # Strawberry Perl bundles a MinGW/POSIX-built ccache.exe that CMake
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5040536Z [36;1m# Strawberry Perl bundles a MinGW/POSIX-built ccache.exe that CMake[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5040999Z [36;1m# auto-detects and uses as CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER.  When it wraps[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5041569Z [36;1m# the native MSVC cl.exe (especially with /showIncludes), the POSIX→Win32[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5042052Z [36;1m# I/O pipe mismatch causes a silent deadlock that hangs the build.[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5042503Z [36;1m# ccache is also pointless in CI (no persistent cache between runs), so[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5042951Z [36;1m# we remove it entirely rather than try to fix the integration.[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5043333Z [36;1m$ccachePath = "C:\Strawberry\c\bin\ccache.exe"[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5043627Z [36;1mif (Test-Path $ccachePath) {[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5043934Z [36;1m  Rename-Item $ccachePath "ccache.exe.bak" -Force[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5044399Z [36;1m  echo "[+] Renamed Strawberry Perl ccache.exe to ccache.exe.bak to prevent MSVC deadlock"[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5044990Z [36;1m} else {[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5045280Z [36;1m  echo "[+] Strawberry Perl ccache.exe not found - nothing to disable"[0m
2026-07-15T19:51:34.5045623Z [36;1m}[0m
